title: AN ACT DECLARING MAY SEVEN OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA

chunks.text:
H. No. 26222 / 88 OG No. 27, 4283 (July 6, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7552, May 22, 1992 ]

AN ACT DECLARING MAY SEVEN OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. May Seven of every year is hereby declared as a special nonworking holiday in the Province of Pampanga.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 4, 1991 and January 30, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 22, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
